name: BioCardia, Inc.
summary: BioCardia, Inc. is a clinical-stage company developing cellular and cell-derived therapeutics for cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases. Its CardiAMP autologous mononuclear cell therapy platform targets ischemic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) and refractory angina from chronic myocardial ischemia. Its allogeneic mesenchymal stem cell (MSC) platform targets ischemic inflammatory HFrEF and ARDS. Products are enabled by the Helix transendocardial biotherapeutic delivery system for minimally invasive catheter-based intramyocardial delivery.

products.name: CardiAMP Cell Therapy System
products.description: Autologous mononuclear cell therapy system comprising a cell potency screening test, point-of-care cell processing platform, and biotherapeutic delivery system for ischemic HFrEF and chronic myocardial ischemia.

products.name: CardiALLO
products.description: Allogeneic MSC off-the-shelf investigational cell therapy targeting ischemic inflammatory HFrEF and designed for all 1.7 million HFrEF patients.

products.name: Helix Transendocardial Biotherapeutic Delivery System
products.description: Minimally invasive catheter-based system enabling intramyocardial delivery of biotherapeutics to the heart; also licensed to partners for development services.

partnerships.description: BioCardia partners its Helix therapeutic delivery platform and provides development services to others seeking to develop biotherapeutic interventions for local delivery to the heart.
